title: Miracle-Gro Rose & Shrub Concentrated Plant Food, 800 ml
features: The concentrate is designed to promote healthy growth, improve the quality of blooms, and increase overall plant vitality
The plant food is suitable for all types of roses and shrubs, including both indoor and outdoor plants
Effective in improving plant health and growth, as well as enhancing the color and quality of blooms.

Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub video Merchant video Previous page Special formula, high in iron and magnesium Feed your roses and shrubs the nutrients they need for twice as many blooms (versus unfed plants)! The superfood for your plants Contains Humifirst which is rich in organic matter - stimulating growth and root formation. Visible results in 7 days The easy way to enjoy healthier, happier, more bountiful plants in just 7 days. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Rose & Shrub Formula 2 Superfood For Your Plants 3 Results In 7 Days 4 Pet & Child Friendly Specially formulated for roses and shrubs Visibly healthier plants in just 7 days! Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub is a concentrated formulation containing Humifirst which is rich in organic matter – stimulating growth, yield, root formation and improving plant resistance to environmental stresses. Give your plants an extra boost with this fast acting feed that last for up to 2 weeks. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub? Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub is rich in iron and magnesium, making it ideal for roses and shrubs. Perfect for use on roses and shrubs in pots and containers, beds and borders. When should I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub? Use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub between March and September, when plants are actively growing. Feed every 2 weeks. How do I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub? Add ½ a cap of Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Rose & Shrub to 1 litre of water. Soak the soil around the base of each plant. Feed every 7-14 days from early spring to late summer. Compare our range of products specially formulated for roses and shrubs Rose & Shrub Liq.
